seo.title: Interior Design Services — Cotswolds, Ludlow & Chelsea | Savery's of Broadway
seo.description: Full home interior design, hand upholstery, bespoke furnishings, bespoke furniture, curtains and soft furnishings, fabric sourcing, antiques, colour consultation, home staging, and project management. Made on-site in the Cotswolds since 1942.

hero.heading: Interior Design Services — Cotswolds, Ludlow & Chelsea

intro: We begin every project by listening. Before a single fabric is chosen or a colour considered, we take time to understand the architecture, the light, and the lives that will unfold within the space.

services.title: Full home interior design
services.description: Complete room and property schemes, from initial concept through to final styling. We manage every detail — spatial planning, colour palettes, furniture selection, soft furnishings, and finishing touches.

services.title: Hand upholstery & reupholstery
services.description: Hand upholstery is a vanishing craft — and one we are determined to keep alive. At our Broadway workshop, frames are still built from seasoned hardwoods, springs are still hand-tied with eight-way ties, and every fabric is cut, stretched, and finished by hands trained over decades. Whether reupholstering a Georgian wing chair or building a new sofa from the frame up, the work happens on-site in the Cotswolds — never outsourced, never rushed. The result is furniture that sits properly, lasts a generation, and bears the quiet evidence of skilled work in every line and seam.

services.title: Bespoke furnishings
services.description: From statement curtains and handmade blinds to one-off cushions, headboards, and upholstered panels — every piece is designed and made to order. We work with clients to select fabrics, trims, and finishes that suit the architecture and bring a room together with quiet, lasting elegance.

services.title: Bespoke furniture
services.description: Some pieces cannot be sourced — they have to be made. Our bench-built furniture is designed and constructed from the frame up at the Broadway workshop, working alongside our upholstery team. Sofas, chairs, ottomans, headboards, and one-off commissions are drawn for the room they will inhabit, the proportions of the architecture, and the way the light falls across them. Hardwood frames are jointed by hand. Cushions are filled to specification. Clients work directly with our makers from sketch to final fitting, choosing every detail — frame shape, cushion fill, fabric, trim, leg, stain. Furniture as it should be: considered, original, made to last.

services.title: Curtains & soft furnishings
services.description: Every curtain, blind, cushion, and headboard is made in-house at our Ludlow workroom — never sub-contracted, never made-to-fit from a stock pattern. Curtains are hand-finished with weighted hems, leading edges, and traditional pleating styles selected for the architecture they hang in. Roman blinds are cut to the millimetre. Cushions are filled with feather and down to the right scale and weight. Headboards are upholstered in matched fabric over hardwood frames built to the bed. The fittings, the linings, the interlinings — all are chosen for longevity. Soft furnishings are where a room earns its quiet sense of completeness, and we treat them accordingly.

services.title: Fabric and material sourcing
services.description: Access to the finest mills and makers across Britain and Europe. Linens, wools, silks, velvets — each chosen for quality, character, and how they feel beneath the hand.

services.title: Furniture sourcing & antiques
services.description: A considered mix of antique and contemporary pieces, handpicked for their craftsmanship and character. We source from trusted dealers, estates, and artisan makers.

services.title: Colour consultation
services.description: Colour is the foundation of every room we compose. We consider how light moves through a space at every hour, selecting tones that feel natural and enduring.

services.title: Home staging
services.description: Presenting a property at its finest for sale. We bring a designer's eye to every room — editing, styling, and dressing spaces so that prospective buyers see not just a house, but a home. From furniture placement and soft furnishings to lighting and finishing touches, we ensure each room tells a compelling, inviting story.

services.title: Project management
services.description: From initial concept to final installation, we oversee every aspect of the project. Our clients are free to enjoy the process, knowing every detail is in careful hands.
